# scrollintoview

Scroll until text or ref is visible

## Usage

```bash
agent-device scrollintoview <text|@ref>
```

## Session Requirement

Usually expects an active session.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- None

## Allowed Flags

- `--max-scrolls <n>`: scrollintoview: cap the number of scroll gestures before failing

## Platform Coverage

| Target | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| iOS sim | Yes |
| iOS device | Yes |
| tvOS sim | Yes |
| macOS | Yes |
| Android emu | Yes |
| Android device | Yes |
| Android TV | Yes |
